question: What is the primary defense of the creatures known as 'Glow-worms' in the Subterranean Caves?

answers.ground_truth: The primary defense of the Glow-worms in the Subterranean Caves is emitting blinding flashes of light when threatened.
answers.original: The primary defense of Glow-worms is emitting a blinding flash of light to temporarily disorient predators.
answers.perturbed: The primary defense of Glow-worms in the Subterranean Caves is the Cave Fungi, which serves as their food source.

ops.description: Glacian can generate Frost-Crowns that provide protective barriers.

entities.name: Glow-Worms
entities.description: Glow-worms are small, segmented creatures found in the Subterranean Caves that emit blinding flashes of light when threatened.<SEP>Glow-Worms are creatures that emit blinding flashes of light when threatened, temporarily disorienting predators.

entities.name: Glowing Insects
entities.description: Glowing insects are prey for the Thorned Crawler.<SEP>Glowing insects are a food source for the Thorned Crawler in the Bioluminescent Forest.

entities.name: Subterranean Caves
entities.description: The Subterranean Caves are a network of deep tunnels filled with unique flora, fauna, and mineral formations.<SEP>The Subterranean Caves are a network of deep tunnels filled with unique flora and fauna, known for hosting various creatures.

entities.name: Cave Fungi
entities.description: Cave fungi are found within the Subterranean Caves and serve as a food source for Glow-worms.

relations.description: The Subterranean Caves are the habitat for Glow-worms, which possess unique defensive mechanisms.<SEP>The Subterranean Caves are home to Glow-Worms, which use their blinding flashes as a defense mechanism.
Glow-worms feed on mineral deposits found within the Subterranean Caves.
The Thorned Crawler feeds on glowing insects.<SEP>The Thorned Crawler feeds on glowing insects.
Glow-worms feed on cave fungi found within the Subterranean Caves.
Glow-worms emit a blinding flash of light to temporarily disorient predators.<SEP>Glow-Worms emit a blinding flash to temporarily disorient predators.
